descriptions: Kavač and Škaljari clans are engaged in a violent turf war over drug routes.
edges.evidence_quote: Their rivalry led to numerous murders and assassinations, not only within Montenegro but across the region, including neighboring Serbia and Croatia.

descriptions: Škaljari clan cooperates with 'Ndrangheta for cocaine transit through Port of Gioia Tauro.
edges.evidence_quote: southern Italy (using Port of Gioia Tauro as a transit point of cocaine shipments, in cooperation with 'Ndrangheta)

descriptions: Barska OCG is a regional clan within Škaljari OCG.
edges.evidence_quote: it operates as an association of highly independent regional clans - "Barska," OCG, "Budvanska" OCG, "Zemunska / Bojović" OCG.

descriptions: Budvanska OCG is a regional clan within Škaljari OCG.
edges.evidence_quote: it operates as an association of highly independent regional clans - "Barska," OCG, "Budvanska" OCG, "Zemunska / Bojović" OCG.

descriptions: Zemunska/Bojović OCG is a regional clan within Škaljari OCG.
edges.evidence_quote: it operates as an association of highly independent regional clans - "Barska," OCG, "Budvanska" OCG, "Zemunska / Bojović" OCG.

descriptions: The Çopja clan and Alibej clan were engaged in a violent rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: However, after a violent rivalry with the "Alibej clan" and extensive investigations, he was arrested in Dubai

Independent Soldiers.description: Organized crime group based in British Columbia, Canada, formed in the early 1990s by Indo-Canadians. Initially known as the Sunset Boys, they became independent from the Punjabi mafia after 1998. Engaged in drug trafficking, murder, and other crimes across Canada and in prisons. Known for red and black colors and the Independent Soldiers clothing brand.

descriptions: Independent Soldiers aligned themselves with the Brothers Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: He and his crew of Troy McKinnon and Cody Sleigh were Independent Soldiers members, who, along with the rest of the Independent Soldiers gang and the Wolfpack alliance, would become rivals with the Red Scorpions and BIBO gang while aligning themselves with the Brothers Keepers gang.

descriptions: The two gangs are closely allied, having a long alliance in the Wolfpack.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers Keepers are currently closely allied to the Independent Soldiers

descriptions: The Independent Soldiers are listed as a rival of the Commisso 'ndrina in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Costa 'ndrina , Independent Soldiers , Rizzuto crime family

descriptions: Hells Angels formed alliances with Independent Soldiers.
edges.evidence_quote: Additionally, the club has also formed alliances with various street gangs, including the Independent Soldiers, the Red Scorpions, the United Nations and the White Boy Posse, and smaller motorcycle gangs, such as Bacchus, the Gate Keepers and the Red Devils.

descriptions: The Independent Soldiers were a puppet gang of the Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: the Hells Angels and their puppet gang, the Independent Soldiers

descriptions: Hells Angels took over the Independent Soldiers, making them a puppet gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Loft Six shootout was the beginning of a takeover of the Independent Soldiers by the Hells Angels and by 2004 the Independent Soldiers were just a Hells Angels puppet gang.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 856 gang

descriptions: The Dhak-Duhre group killed Independent Soldier members, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Two hitmen from the Dhak-Duhre organization were able to enter...

descriptions: Independent Soldiers acted as proxy for Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: the Independent Soldiers (acting, as they always did, as the Hells Angels' proxy)

descriptions: Independent Soldiers became a puppet gang for Hells Angels after 2003.
edges.evidence_quote: the Independent Soldiers steadily became less and less independent... The Independent Soldiers were reduced down to being a puppet gang for the Hells Angels.

edges.evidence_quote: Riarch was promoted up from the Independent Soldiers to join the Hells Angels.

edges.evidence_quote: two members, namely Michael Justin Lal and his brother Corey Jason Lal, both left the Independent Soldiers to found their own gang, the Lal crew.

descriptions: United Nations murdered the leader of the Independent Soldiers.
edges.evidence_quote: On 25 June 2012, Randy Naicker, the leader of the Independent Soldiers and a Wolfpack member, was murdered by the UN gang in Port Moody.

descriptions: Independent Soldiers members James Riach and Randy Naicker were founding members of the Wolfpack Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Jonathan Bacon together with Larry Amero of the Hells Angels and James Riach and Randy Naicker of the Independent Soldiers formed a group called the Wolfpack Alliance in 2010.

descriptions: Independent Soldiers leaders were co-founders of the Wolfpack.
edges.evidence_quote: The other leaders of the Wolfpack Alliance were ... Randy Naicker and James Riach of the Independent Soldiers

descriptions: The Wolfpack, Red Scorpions, and Independent Soldiers are all active organized crime groups in British Columbia.
edges.evidence_quote: Lindsey Houghton of CFSEU-BC stated: 'We’ve seen and heard the name Wolfpack over the last year . We’ve heard their name come up in places like Kamloops and Surrey. So they are still very active and groups like the Red Scorpions and Independent Soldiers – these groups are still active and prominent in that world.'

descriptions: Sundowners MC listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Satan's Choice MC , Sundowners MC , Devil's Disciples MC (Boston, USA)

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dubois Brothers, Hells Angels, Rizzuto crime family, Grim Reapers, Gitans MC, 13th Tribe MC, Sundowners MC

descriptions: Buccaneers were a motorcycle gang affiliated with Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: police, acting on intelligence supplied by an informant in the Buccaneers, another motorcycle gang affiliated with the Hells Angels

descriptions: Buccaneers are a Hells Angels support club.
edges.evidence_quote: police, acting on intelligence supplied by an informant in the Buccaneers – a Hells Angels support club – arrested eight Hells Angels members in Grenoble in connection with the shooting, as well as members of the Buccaneers who supplied the stolen motorcycles used in the attack.

Indian Posse.description: Indigenous street gang based in Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada, founded in 1988 by the Wolfe brothers. One of the largest street gangs in Canada, involved in drug trafficking, auto theft, firearms, and other crimes. Designated as indigenous-based organized crime by Criminal Intelligence Service Canada. Still active.

descriptions: Cash Money Brothers was founded by a former Indian Posse member who left due to factionalism.
edges.evidence_quote: Clarence 'Shrimpy' Williams to leave the gang to found a new gang called the Cash Money Brothers

descriptions: The Indian Posse is a major rival of the Hells Angels in western Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: The Indian Posse has since emerged as one of the Hells Angels' major rivals in western Canada.

descriptions: Indian Posse supports and facilitates criminal activities for Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: CISC asserts that the Indian Posse, in addition to engaging in marijuana cultivation, auto theft, illegal firearms activities, gambling, and drug trafficking, also supports and facilitates criminal activities for the Hells Angels motorcycle gang and Asian-based networks.

descriptions: Indian Posse created the Indian Posse Girls as a female auxiliary.
edges.evidence_quote: The Indian Posse has created a female auxiliary, the Indian Posse Girls

descriptions: Manitoba Warriors is listed as a rival of Indian Posse in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels MC, Manitoba Warriors, Redd Alert, White Boy Posse

descriptions: The two gangs fought each other in a prison riot.
edges.evidence_quote: On 25 April 1996, a riot broke out at Headingley Correctional Institution between the imprisoned Indian Posse members versus the imprisoned members of the rival Manitoba Warriors

descriptions: Indian Posse and Manitoba Warriors are rival gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: rivalries between First Nations gangs such as the Indian Posse, the Native Syndicate, and the Manitoba Warriors

descriptions: Indian Posse members killed a member of the rival MOB Squad.
edges.evidence_quote: beating to death Paris Bruce, a member of the rival MOB Squad

descriptions: Overlords attacked Indian Posse, which retaliated with a drive-by shooting.
edges.evidence_quote: On the night of 9 February 1994, a rival gang called the Overlords fired a shotgun at an Indian Posse house, leading to a drive-by shooting in retaliation a few hours later that left a woman wounded.

descriptions: Redd Alert is also listed as a rival of Indian Posse in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels MC, Manitoba Warriors, Redd Alert, White Boy Posse

descriptions: Some factions of Redd Alert are allies of Indian Posse in British Columbia and Northern Territories.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: West End Gang Some factions of Redd Alert in British Columbia and Northern Territories

descriptions: Indian Posse member killed a member of the rival Terror Squad.
edges.evidence_quote: shot and killed in public a member of the rival Terror Squad

descriptions: West End Gang is listed as an ally of Indian Posse in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: West End Gang

descriptions: Danny Wolfe of the Indian Posse befriended the boss of the West End Gang, leading to a profitable alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: While serving a prison sentence in 2003 and 2004, Danny Wolfe befriended Gerry Matticks, the imprisoned boss of the Irish-Canadian West End Gang of Montreal.

descriptions: White Boy Posse is listed as a rival of Indian Posse in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels MC, Manitoba Warriors, Redd Alert, White Boy Posse

descriptions: The Indian Posse has a violent rivalry with the White Boy Posse.
edges.evidence_quote: The Indian Posse has a violent rivalry with the white supremacist gang, the White Boy Posse, which serves as a puppet gang for the Hells Angels in Alberta.

descriptions: The Indian Posse and the Zig Zag Crew engaged in violent incidents in prison.
edges.evidence_quote: In the summer of 2002, there had been a number of violent incidents at Stoney Mountain Penitentiary between the imprisoned members of the Hells Angels' puppet gang, the Zig Zag Crew, and the Indian Posse.

descriptions: Manitoba Warriors were founded to rival Indian Posse.
edges.evidence_quote: the gang is an exclusively indigenous Canadian organization that was established on the Lake Manitoba First Nation in 1993 to rival the Indian Posse gang.

descriptions: Manitoba Warriors was founded to rival Indian Posse.
edges.evidence_quote: the gang is an exclusively indigenous Canadian organization that was established on the Lake Manitoba First Nation in 1993 to rival the Indian Posse gang.

descriptions: Redd Alert was founded as an alternative to joining the Indian Posse or Manitoba Warriors, indicating rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: The rival Redd Alert gang were founded in Alberta's prisons by First Nations prisoners who did not want to be forced to join either the Indian Posse or the Warriors.

descriptions: Redd Alert was formed as an alternative to joining Indian Posse, indicating a non-cooperative, possibly rivalrous origin.
edges.evidence_quote: Redd Alert was established in 1999 by Robert Lee Wagner along with other First Nations inmates of Cree, Anishinaabe, and Métis origin as an alternative to joining two of the other Aboriginal gangs within the Alberta prison system: the Indian Posse and the Manitoba Warriors.

descriptions: Infobox lists Indian Posse as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bandidos Motorcycle Club , Manitoba Warriors , Crazy Dragon Killers , Indian Posse

descriptions: Ferraro-Raccosta and Mazzagatti-Polimeni-Bonarrigo were in a faida.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1992 scoppia la cosiddetta faida di Oppido Mamertina tra i Ferraro-Raccosta e i Mazzagatti - Polimeni-Bonarrigo che provocherà 22 morti.

descriptions: Mammoliti supported Ferraro-Raccosta in the faida of Oppido Mamertina.
edges.evidence_quote: i Mammoliti dettero l'appoggio ai Ferraro-Raccosta .

descriptions: Infobox lists Interbrigades as an affiliate, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Affiliations: Pyatnashka Brigade, Interbrigades, Rusich, Espanyola

edges.evidence_quote: The Bandidos later former another youth branch called Mexican Team Work.

edges.evidence_quote: a shootout involving members of the Bandidos and the Waterdogs biker gang at the 41st annual Red River Memorial Day Motorcycle Rally in Red River

edges.evidence_quote: successful hits against leaders of rival gangs ( Southside , Brick City, Ghost Town ) in 2010

edges.evidence_quote: The Rats took control of the truck and made off with $2.4 million in cash and negotiable bonds after receiving a tip from the Cuckoo Gang.

descriptions: Michaels family emerged from remnants of the Cuckoo Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Two rival Lebanese crime families, the Michaels family and the Leisure family, emerged in St. Louis, Missouri from the remnants of the Cuckoo Gang, a bootlegging and gambling outfit which operated during the Prohibition era.

311 Boyz.description: The 311 Boyz was a teen gang in Las Vegas, Nevada, estimated at 140 members, active in 2003. The group consisted mostly of young males who attended Centennial High School and lived in the northwest area of Las Vegas. They were involved in violent acts, including an attack on a pickup truck that led to multiple criminal charges. The gang's existence and activities were disputed in court, with a judge ruling they did not fit the legal definition of a gang.

descriptions: Black Jackets and Kommando 210 are allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rock Machine , Veles gang , Black Dogs , Bandogs , 210 International , Dogpack 416 , Black Army , Holmblaaa , Kommando 210

descriptions: Gremium absorbed Local BrotherHood by patching them over.
edges.evidence_quote: Gremium opened a chapter in the traditional Bandidos stronghold of Helsinge on 3 February 2017 by patching-over the Local BrotherHood (LBH) gang.

edges.evidence_quote: As well as 18th Street gang (particularly the 106th St in Inglewood), as well as the Grave Yard Gangsta Crips in Santa Monica and Culver City 13 in the Mar Vista neighborhood.

edges.source: Movement for the Emancipation of the Niger Delta
descriptions: MEND is part of JRC, which includes MB; JRC is controlled by MB.
edges.evidence_quote: El MEND es parte del JRC que agrupa al MB, grupo fundado por White ese año, tras dejar de ser portavoz del NDPVF. El JRC se halla controlado por el MB.

Los Solidos.description: Los Solidos is a street gang founded in the early 1990s by Lawrence Beauvais in Hartford, Connecticut. The gang formed from the merger of two other gangs to defend against larger rivals like the Latin Kings. It operates in Hartford, Springfield, Massachusetts, and other northeastern cities, involved in drug trafficking, weapons sales, and violent crimes. Despite leadership arrests, the gang remains active as of 2026.

descriptions: The Ghetto Brothers merged with Savage Nomads to create Los Solidos.
edges.evidence_quote: the Ghetto Brothers and the Savage Nomads joined to form Los Solidos

descriptions: Los Solidos is listed as a rival of Latin Kings.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Crips, Dominicans Don't Play, Folk Nation, Gangster Disciples, Latin Eagles, Maniac Latin Disciples, MS-13, Ñetas, La Raza Nation, Simon City Royals, Los Solidos, Spanish Cobras, Tiny Rascal Gang, United Blood Nation

descriptions: Enemy listed in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Los Sólidos

descriptions: Los Solidos formed to defend against Latin Kings, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Solidos was founded by Lawrence Beauvais from the remains of two other gangs that merged to help defend themselves against larger gangs such as the Latin Kings.

descriptions: Los Solidos and Latin Kings engaged in a feud from 1993-1994.
edges.evidence_quote: Following the 1993-1994 feud with the Latin Kings, the President of the Puerto Rican street gang, Jorge Rivera, was given 13 concurrent life sentences...

descriptions: The Savage Nomads merged with Ghetto Brothers to form Los Solidos.
edges.evidence_quote: the Ghetto Brothers and the Savage Nomads joined to form Los Solidos
